translation: By the sun and its brightness,
urdu: سورج کی قسم اور اس کی روشنی کی

translation: And by the moon as it reflects it [brightness of the Sun],
urdu: اور چاند کی جب اس کے پیچھے نکلے

translation: And by the day, when it displays it [brightness of the Sun],
urdu: اور دن کی جب اُسے چمکا دے

translation: And by the night, when it veils it [brightness of the Sun].
urdu: اور رات کی جب اُسے چھپا لے

translation: And by the sky and what it constitutes ,
notes: The sky constitutes innumerable and huge material bodies that, under divine direction, rotate and, also, revolve around other material bodies with a mind-boggling mathematical precision that effectively prevents one body crashing into another.
urdu: اور آسمان کی اور اس ذات کی جس نے اسے بنایا

translation: And by the earth and what makes it spread [prolong] its existence,
notes: Its rotation around its axis, its revolution around the sun, its atmosphere and many such imponderables under divine direction enable the earth to continue giving life sustaining provisions to innumerable living creatures on this earth.
urdu: اور زمین کی اور اس کی جس نے اسے پھیلایا

translation: And by the soul and what shapes it.
notes: The blood that starts spurting from the miniscule and rudimentary heart in a 3-week old fertilized ovum shapes it into a human being and continues to sustain it throughout its life, under divine direction.
urdu: اور انسان کی اور اس کی جس نے اس (کے اعضا) کو برابر کیا

translation: Then inspired it with knowledge of what is wrong for it and what is right.
notes: The Qur’aan – as also books originally revealed earlier like the Torah and the Injeel – is divinely inspired for guidance of human soul, as to what is wrong for it and what is right.
urdu: پھر اس کو بدکاری (سے بچنے) اور پرہیزگاری کرنے کی سمجھ دی

translation: Certainly, the one who keeps it [soul] pure is successful,
urdu: کہ جس نے (اپنے) نفس (یعنی روح) کو پاک رکھا وہ مراد کو پہنچا

translation: And, certainly, the one who corrupts it is ruined.
urdu: اور جس نے اسے خاک میں ملایا وہ خسارے میں رہا

translation: The people of Thamood denied the Truth by committing transgression,
urdu: (قوم) ثمود نے اپنی سرکشی کے سبب (پیغمبر کو) جھٹلایا

translation: When the most wicked man among them came forward [to disobey divine directive].
notes: He took the lead in crippling the she-camel Allah Ta’ala had sent to test those people. See Verse 14 below.
urdu: جب ان میں سے ایک نہایت بدبخت اٹھا

arabic: فَقَالَ لَهُمۡ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ نَاقَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَسُقۡيَٰهَا
transliteration: Faqala lahum rasoolu Allahi naqata Allahi wasuqyaha
translation: Allah’s Messenger had then warned them about Allah’s she-camel and her [allotted time of] drink.
urdu: تو خدا کے پیغمبر (صالح) نے ان سے کہا کہ خدا کی اونٹنی اور اس کے پانی پینے کی باری سے عذر کرو

arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَعَقَرُوهَا فَدَمۡدَمَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ رَبُّهُم بِذَنۢبِهِمۡ فَسَوَّىٰهَا
transliteration: Fakaththaboohu faAAaqarooha fadamdama AAalayhim rabbuhum bithanbihim fasawwaha
translation: But they rejected him and crippled her. For this sin of theirs, their Lord let loose His anger upon them, and razed their dwellings to the ground.
urdu: مگر انہوں نے پیغمبر کو جھٹلایا اور اونٹنی کی کونچیں کاٹ دیں تو خدا نے ان کےگناہ کے سبب ان پر عذاب نازل کیا اور سب کو (ہلاک کر کے) برابر کر دیا

translation: And He has not to be afraid of its consequences.
urdu: اور اس کو ان کے بدلہ لینے کا کچھ بھی ڈر نہیں
